title: s3 driver backend config
description: Schema for the config: block under a backend entry whose driver is s3. Covers all S3-compatible implementations (aws, r2, minio, versitygw, ...).

implementation.description: Optional discriminator. When set, gates implementation-specific Buckety parameters. With implementation: r2, Bucketys against this backend may set spec.parameters.jurisdiction (eu for EU-resident data; omit for the global default). See parameters.schema.json. Omit implementation to disable capability gating (only common-shape parameters work).

endpoint.description: Service URL. For R2: https://<account>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com (or https://<jurisdiction-id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com for a jurisdictional endpoint). For in-cluster: http://y-s3-api.blobs.svc.cluster.local:9000.

region.description: AWS-style region. Use 'auto' for R2 (R2 uses spec.parameters.jurisdiction for data residency, not region), 'us-east-1' for MinIO/VersityGW unless configured otherwise.

forcePathStyle.description: Use path-style addressing instead of virtual-hosted-style. Required by some in-cluster S3 implementations.

accessKeyID.description: Backend root access key. envsubst:"true" - supports ${VAR} interpolation at controller startup.

secretAccessKey.description: Backend root secret key. envsubst:"true" - supports ${VAR} interpolation at controller startup.
